highlights: Recovery release v2026.3.13-1 (GitHub immutable release fix)
Compaction: use full-session token count for post-compaction sanity check
Telegram: thread media transport policy into SSRF
Discord: handle gateway metadata fetch failures
Session: preserve lastAccountId and lastThreadId on session reset
Security: prevent gateway token leak in Docker build context
Cron: prevent isolated cron nested lane deadlocks
breaking: Onboarding now defaults to messaging tools
ACP dispatch now defaults to enabled
